name: Potential File and Directory Discovery
notes: This rule triggers when a file or directory is searched for information discovery. An adversary may enumerate files and directories or may search in specific locations of a host or network share for certain information within a file system.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: File and Directory Discovery - Linux
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Powershell File and Directory Discovery
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: File and Directory Discovery - Linux, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla Group Lateral Movement, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Powershell File and Directory Discovery
TD_list: APPLY Potential File and Directory Discovery on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: File and Directory Discovery - Linux, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Turla Group Lateral Movement, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Powershell File and Directory Discovery
RED_list: Event name: Potential File and Directory Discovery

Event description: Detects when a file or directory is searched for information discovery. An adversary may enumerate files and directories or may search in specific locations of a host or network share for certain information within a file system.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
